zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Simon Preston II於大約1340年出生在蘇格蘭艾丁波時，他的父親Sir Simon Preston I28歲，母親Jonet Sinclair25歲。他和Mrs Simon Preston至少有4個兒子。他去世於大約1400年在他的家鄉享年62歲。

en.Preston Patrick, Westmoreland, England: Preston Patrick, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Simon Preston II was born about 1340, in Edinburgh, Scotland, his father, Sir Simon Preston I, was 28 and his mother, Jonet Sinclair, was 25. He had at least 4 sons with Mrs Simon Preston. He died about 1400, in his hometown, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Simon Preston II est né environ 1340, à Edinburgh, Écosse, son père, Sir Simon Preston I, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Jonet Sinclair, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Mrs Simon Preston. Il est décédé environ 1400, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Simon Preston IIが約1340年にスコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父Sir Simon Preston Iは28歳，母Jonet Sinclairは25歳であった。彼はMrs Simon Prestonとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1400年に故郷で62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Simon Preston II(이)가 대략 1340년 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Simon Preston I(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Jonet Sinclair(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Mrs Simon Preston(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1400년 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Mrs Simon Preston. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1400, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Simon Preston II родился около 1340 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Simon Preston I было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Jonet Sinclair, 25. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Mrs Simon Preston. Он умер около 1400 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет.
